text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #6)
QA for 1.13.4 patch:

 ... with various opt combinations: DOCS=on, SMB=on & off, PYTHON2=on, PYTHON3=on, PYTHON2/3=off

 - stage-qa & check-plist: ok
 - portlint (no new errors or warnings)
